# SOLIDWORKS API Markdown Docs

Generated from local SOLIDWORKS HelpViewer packages.

## Included Docsets

- `sldworksapi`: 14516 pages. Core SOLIDWORKS COM API interfaces, methods, properties, and events.
- `swcommands`: 5 pages. SOLIDWORKS command IDs.
- `swconst`: 964 pages. SOLIDWORKS API constants and enumerations.
- `swdocmgrapi`: 992 pages. SOLIDWORKS Document Manager API.
